name: Zhouxing Zhao (赵周行)
headline: R&D Director | Chief Architect | AI, Data & Cloud-Edge Systems
summary: Zhouxing Zhao works on AI engineering, data governance, low-altitude UAV applications, cloud-edge collaboration, and intelligent scheduling systems. His work connects enterprise architecture, research-driven product development, and large-scale engineering delivery across digital transformation scenarios.

highlights.text: Recognized with the Most Beautiful Science and Technology Worker honor by China Telecom Association for Science and Technology.
Led and participated in key projects on professional UAV R&D, data-driven code assembly, cloud-edge intelligent cores, and enterprise data governance.
Team achievements include recognition for Zhejiang Multimodal Intelligent IoT Communication Technology Key Enterprise Research Institute and Zhejiang Comservice advanced team.
Recognized as Excellent Architect by Zhejiang Smart City Promotion Association.

experience.organization: China Communications Services / Zhejiang Communications Services
bullets: Leads AI and data product R&D, digital transformation architecture, and cross-provincial delivery.
Built an AI capability platform and a 50-person AI R&D team with engineering standards and documentation practices.
Designed low-code, data asset, and reusable component architectures to reduce integration complexity.

experience.organization: Hangzhou Shuopan Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd.
bullets: Managed a 40-person R&D team and built master-data and foundational-data systems with TOGAF enterprise architecture methods.
Used data fabric and application assembly practices to shorten enterprise product delivery cycles.
Built DevOps and continuous integration systems from the ground up.
Led B2B DevOps platform construction from zero to one and reduced application release time significantly.
Designed KMS architecture for large-scale attachment data and intelligent permission management.
Managed software product BOM systems and received Hikvision's Golden Brick Award for two consecutive years.

education.details: Research focus: automatic control theory and applications.

projects.title: Professional UAV R&D and Applications for Typical Low-Altitude Scenarios
projects.summary: Developed a professional UAV platform for urban security, emergency communications, perception scheduling, intelligent recognition, and task collaboration in low-altitude scenarios.
projects.outcome: Built a unified scheduling platform for heterogeneous UAVs and improved real-time response capabilities in complex environments.

projects.title: Data-Driven Code Assembly Platform
projects.summary: Led an automated code assembly platform based on data-driven reuse, component reuse, modular repositories, and knowledge graphs.
projects.outcome: The platform improved average R&D efficiency by more than 30% according to the personal statement.

projects.title: Cloud-Edge Intelligent Core for Integrated Sensing and Collaborative Dispatching
projects.summary: Designed cloud-edge intelligent core architecture and lightweight AI inference technologies for constrained terminals, reducing AI processing latency and bandwidth usage in pilot applications.

projects.title: Key Technologies for Photovoltaic Cloud-Edge-Device Collaborative Intelligent Response
projects.summary: Researched cloud-edge-device collaboration for photovoltaic scenarios, including edge real-time monitoring, cloud scheduling, terminal response, and predictive maintenance.
projects.outcome: The personal statement records reported sales revenue of RMB 1 billion from this achievement.
